message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Adds patterns for multi-agent coordination and runtime artifacts:
- .mail_repo/ (MCP Agent Mail local archive)
- __pycache__/, *.pyc (Python bytecode from e2e tests)
- .beads/.br_history/ (beads JSONL history snapshots)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,3 +50,13 @@ crates/ftui-extras/src/seq_*.py
 
 # Local agent scratch
 .plan
+
+# MCP Agent Mail local archive
+.mail_repo/
+
+# Python cache
+__pycache__/
+*.pyc
+
+# Beads history snapshots (JSONL export is tracked, history is local)
+.beads/.br_history/
